journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Autonomous UAV Navigation for Close-Range Image Acquisition of Scaffold Joints
abstract: Scaffold joints are critical structural elements that require continuous inspection. However, their small size and wide distribution make manual inspection inefficient. To address this challenge, this paper proposes an autonomous uncrewed aerial vehicle (UAV)-based method to efficiently capture close-range images of joints for inspection. The first module generates a real-time three-dimensional (3D) point cloud map using LiDAR and simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) and converts it into a bird’s-eye view (BEV) image to provide spatial context. The second module plans scanning paths based on these data and performs three functions: (1) detecting scaffolds in the BEV image using a deep learning model and segments them into scan units; (2) evaluating scan feasibility based on UAV accessibility and obstacles; and (3) prioritizing and selecting the next target based on path efficiency and generates a collision-free trajectory. Experimental results at two outdoor construction sites demonstrated that the proposed method captured close-range images of all joints via autonomous flight, achieving 100% (207 joints) coverage. This study proposes a novel UAV-based method for autonomous close-range scanning of scaffolds, enabling precise monitoring of detailed components such as joints.
topics: Innovations in Concrete and Construction Materials
title_cn: 自主无人机导航用于脚手架接头的近距离图像获取
abstract_cn: 脚手架接头是关键的结构元素，需要进行持续的检查。然而，由于它们体积小且分布广，使得人工检查效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种基于自主无人机（UAV）的方法，以高效捕捉接头的近距离图像进行检查。第一个模块通过激光雷达（LiDAR）和同步定位与地图构建技术（SLAM）生成实时的三维（3D）点云图，并将其转化为鸟瞰图（BEV）以提供空间上下文。第二个模块基于这些数据规划扫描路径，并执行三个功能：（1）使用深度学习模型在BEV图像中检测脚手架，并将其分割为扫描单元；（2）根据无人机的可达性和障碍物评估扫描的可行性；（3）基于路径效率优先选择下一个目标，并生成无碰撞轨迹。在两个户外施工现场的实验结果表明，所提方法通过自主飞行捕获了所有接头的近距离图像，实现了100%（207个接头）的覆盖。本研究提出了一种新颖的基于无人机的方法，用于自主的近距离脚手架扫描，使得对接头等细节组件的精确监测成为可能。

title: Lithology identification from missing well log data: a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework
abstract: Accurate lithology identification from well log data is fundamental for reservoir characterization, yet its practical application is often impeded by the dual challenges of incomplete well log data and scarce labeled samples. Existing data-driven methods often address these issues separately or require extensive complete labeled data, limiting their effectiveness in low-resource geological exploration scenarios. To address this compound challenge, this paper proposes a multi-constraint guided self-supervised diffusion framework, designated as MCG-SSDF, based on a generative pre-training paradigm. The framework first employs a novel multi-constraint guided diffusion model, MCG-Diff, for unsupervised pre-training on large-scale unlabeled data. This model integrates a Mamba backbone with three geological priors, namely a global structural constraint, a petrophysical correlation constraint, and a geological morphological constraint, to enhance the fidelity and physical plausibility of well log data generation and imputation. Subsequently, a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy is applied, where only a lightweight classification head is trained on a small set of labeled, incomplete samples, enabling the framework to perform end-to-end lithology identification directly from incomplete data during the inference stage. Systematic evaluations on two oilfield datasets validate the framework across deterministic accuracy and uncertainty quantification. Results reveal that MCG-SSDF outperforms baselines, particularly under extreme label scarcity. Ablation studies and attribution analyses further confirm the synergistic contributions and decision reliability of integrated geological constraints. This methodology provides a robust solution for high-precision lithology identification in low-resource environments.
title_cn: 基于缺失井日志数据的岩性识别：一种多约束引导的自监督扩散框架
abstract_cn: 从井日志数据中准确识别岩性是油藏特征描述的基础，但其实际应用常因不完整的井日志数据和稀缺的标记样本而受到阻碍。现有的数据驱动方法通常分别解决这些问题，或者需要大量完整的标记数据，这限制了其在低资源地质勘探场景中的有效性。为了解决这一复合性挑战，本文提出了一种多约束引导的自监督扩散框架，命名为MCG-SSDF，基于生成预训练范式。该框架首先采用一种新颖的多约束引导扩散模型MCG-Diff，对大规模未标记数据进行无监督预训练。该模型结合了Mamba骨干网络和三种地质先验，即全球结构约束、岩石物理相关约束和地质形态约束，以增强井日志数据生成和插值的逼真性和物理合理性。随后，应用了一种高效的参数微调策略，仅对一小组标记的、未完整的样本训练轻量级分类头，使框架能够在推理阶段直接从不完整数据中进行端到端的岩性识别。在两个油田数据集上的系统评估验证了该框架在确定性准确性和不确定性量化方面的表现。结果表明，MCG-SSDF在极端标签稀缺的情况下优于基线方法。消融研究和归因分析进一步确认了集成地质约束所带来的协同贡献和决策可靠性。该方法为在低资源环境中实现高精度岩性识别提供了一种强有力的解决方案。

title: A method based on double-weighted closeness centrality for identifying firefighting strategies in industrial plants considering domino effects
abstract: • Domino effects are modeled as double-weighted directed graphs. • New relationships are developed for ‘distance’ and ‘closeness centrality’ • Firefighting strategies are identified by minimizing the closeness of burning units. • The method is easy to implement as it is independent of fire spread probabilities. Firefighting at process plants is considered the last line of defence in fire protection. As such, the success and efficiency of firefighting strategies directly impact the safety, integrity, and damage cost of process plants and adjacent on-site and off-site structures and facilities. Suppressing burning units while cooling exposed units is the most intuitive strategy, which is also practiced at process plants, for preventing fire spread and potential domino effects, assuming that firefighting resources (equipment, crew, water, etc.) are sufficient to deal with all the burning and exposed units. However, when firefighting resources are insufficient, models are required to help firefighters identify the most critical units and prioritize viable firefighting strategies accordingly. In the present study, after modelling domino effects as a double-weighted directed graph, i.e., a graph with weighted nodes and edges, it is shown that effective firefighting strategies can be identified by minimizing the closeness centrality of burning units. The developed method not only results in consistent firefighting strategies compared with the risk-based methods in the literature, but also requires fewer input parameters (basically, heat flux and asset monetary values), alleviating the need for calculating the fire escalation probabilities.
title_cn: 一种基于双重加权接近中心性的识别工业厂房消防策略的方法，考虑多米诺效应。
abstract_cn:
• 多米诺效应被建模为双重加权有向图。  
• 为“距离”和“紧密中心性”开发了新关系。  
• 通过最小化燃烧单元的紧密度识别灭火策略。  
• 该方法易于实施，因为它不依赖于火势传播概率。  

在过程工业中，灭火被视为火灾防护的最后防线。因此，灭火策略的成功和效率直接影响到过程设施以及邻近现场和非现场结构与设施的安全性、完整性和损坏成本。在假设灭火资源（设备、团队、水等）充足以应对所有燃烧和暴露单元的情况下，压制燃烧单元并冷却暴露单元是最直观的策略，这在过程设施中也是常见做法，用于防止火灾蔓延和潜在的多米诺效应。然而，当灭火资源不足时，需要模型来帮助消防员识别最关键的单元并相应地优先考虑可行的灭火策略。在本研究中，经过将多米诺效应建模为双重加权有向图（即具有加权节点和边的图），结果表明可以通过最小化燃烧单元的紧密中心性来识别有效的灭火策略。所开发的方法不仅相比于文献中的风险基础方法提供了一致的灭火策略，而且所需输入参数更少（基本上是热流和资产货币价值），减轻了计算火灾升级概率的需求。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Safety Performance Evaluation Model for Off-Site Construction through the Integration of Key Leading and Lagging Factors
abstract: Off-site construction, a growing alternative to traditional building methods, offers advantages such as reduced environmental impact, improved productivity, and cost efficiency. However, off-site construction introduces new and unique safety challenges across its multiple phases of fabrication, transportation, and assembly. The Experience Modification Rating (EMR), a widely used insurance metric in traditional construction, remains the primary factor used by insurance carriers to adjust workers’ compensation premiums for off-site firms. However, the industry’s reliance on an outdated metric that relies on lagging safety indicators, broad classifications, and other nonsafety factors raises significant concerns over its applicability in reflecting the distinct safety risks and operational contexts of off-site work. Therefore, this research examines the inadequacies of EMR in this sector and identifies 70 key safety factors specific to off-site processes through an extensive literature review of 76 research publications. A structured survey was used to validate the relevance and importance of these factors and was distributed to professionals from both the off-site construction and insurance industries, yielding 30 valid responses. Based on the findings, this paper explores the potential for alternative safety evaluation approaches that are off-site-specific and data-driven and considers all relevant leading and lagging factors. Thus, using the Relative Importance Index (RII), this study establishes 36 validated, high-priority safety metrics, laying the groundwork for future multicriteria-based assessment models tailored to off-site construction. Additionally, applying the Mann–Whitney U test revealed significant intergroup differences in factor prioritization between off-site construction professionals and insurance providers, highlighting key divergences in safety perception.
title_cn: 离场施工安全性能评估模型：通过关键领先因素和滞后因素的整合
abstract_cn: 离场施工作为传统建筑方法的替代方案，正在不断发展，其优点包括降低环境影响、提高生产力和成本效益。然而，离场施工在其多个阶段，包括制造、运输和组装中引入了新的独特安全挑战。经验修正率（EMR）是传统建筑中广泛使用的保险指标，仍然是保险公司用来调整离场企业工人赔偿保险费的主要因素。然而，行业对这一依赖于滞后安全指标、宽泛分类和其他非安全因素的过时指标的依赖，引发了其在反映离场工作特有安全风险和运营环境的适用性方面的重大担忧。因此，本研究探讨了EMR在该领域的不足之处，并通过对76篇研究文献的广泛回顾，确定了70个特定于离场过程的关键安全因素。为验证这些因素的相关性和重要性，采用了结构化问卷，并将其分发给离场施工和保险行业的专业人士，最终收回了30份有效反馈。基于调查结果，本文探讨了针对离场施工的替代安全评估方法的潜力，这些方法应是特定于离场的和数据驱动的，考虑所有相关的领先和滞后因素。因此，通过使用相对重要性指数（RII），本研究建立了36个经过验证的高优先级安全指标，为未来针对离场施工的多标准评估模型奠定了基础。此外，采用曼-惠特尼U检验揭示了离场施工专业人士与保险供应商在因素优先级方面的显著群体间差异，突显出安全认知方面的关键分歧。

title: A meta-learning-guided TD3 control algorithm with adaptive experience replay for active vibration isolator
title_cn: 一种基于元学习的TD3控制算法，结合自适应经验回放应用于主动振动隔离器

title: Tracking and synchronization control strategy of dual-motor steer-by-wire system considering uncertain time delay
abstract: With the increasing intelligence of vehicles, the growing network communication load introduces uncertain time delays in control signal transmission, posing a more serious challenge to the precise tracking and synchronization control of dual-motor steer-by-wire systems. To address this problem, this paper proposes a tracking and synchronization control strategy. Firstly, a dynamic model of the steering motor incorporating time delays is established. On this basis, an Online Identification Adaptive Smith Predictor (OIASP) is designed to accurately estimate the uncertain time delays in the system. Furthermore, an Adaptive Hybrid Active Disturbance Rejection Control (AHADRC) controller is proposed, which utilizes a Phase Advance Extended State Observer (PAESO) to reduce phase lag in the observed states. Combined with feedforward control and linear state error feedback, a FF-LSEF composite control law is constructed, significantly enhancing the dynamic tracking performance and robustness against complex disturbances. Theoretical analysis demonstrates the favorable stability of the proposed AHADRC. Additionally, a mean deviation coupling synchronization control structure is incorporated to further enhance the synchronization accuracy of the steering system. Finally, the effectiveness of the proposed control strategy in suppressing uncertain time delays and external disturbances was verified through simulation experiments and hardware-in-the-loop tests.
title_cn: 考虑不确定时间延迟的双电机线控转向系统的跟踪与同步控制策略
abstract_cn: 随着车辆智能化的不断提高，日益增长的网络通信负载导致控制信号传输中的不确定时间延迟，这对双电机线控转向系统的精确跟踪与同步控制提出了更为严峻的挑战。为了解决这一问题，本文提出了一种跟踪与同步控制策略。首先，建立了考虑时间延迟的转向电机动态模型。在此基础上，设计了一种在线识别自适应史密斯预报器（OIASP），以准确估计系统中的不确定时间延迟。此外，提出了一种自适应混合主动扰动抑制控制器（AHADRC），该控制器利用相位提前扩展状态观测器（PAESO）来减少观测状态中的相位滞后。结合前馈控制和线性状态误差反馈，构建了一种FF-LSEF复合控制法则，显著提升了动态跟踪性能及对复杂干扰的鲁棒性。理论分析证明了所提出的AHADRC的良好稳定性。此外，融合了均值偏差耦合同步控制结构，进一步增强了转向系统的同步精度。最后，通过仿真实验和硬件在环测试验证了所提出控制策略在抑制不确定时间延迟和外部干扰方面的有效性。

title: Terrain-adaptive motion planning for autonomous mobile cranes with load sway suppression
abstract: Mobile cranes are essential construction equipment for lifting and transporting materials. However, their robotisation presents significant challenges due to uneven terrain and complex payload dynamics during walking operations. This paper presents a terrain-adaptive motion planner for autonomous mobile cranes (AMCs) that navigates construction site topography whilst suppressing load sway. It integrates a vehicle posture estimator and an analytical load sway prediction model, implemented on a GPU-based parallel computation architecture. Validation was conducted through high-fidelity simulations in NVIDIA Isaac Sim. The posture estimation module demonstrated accurate predictions across elevation grid maps of varying resolutions, whilst the sway prediction model achieved accurate forecasts up to 3 s. The motion planner successfully navigated varying terrain and dynamic obstacles while maintaining sway angles below the safety threshold and achieving real-time performance. The results demonstrate the feasibility of integrating terrain adaptation with sway suppression for AMC operations in unstructured construction sites. • Developed terrain-adaptive motion planner for autonomous mobile cranes. • Integrated load sway suppression into motion planning framework. • Proposed predictive load sway model for mobile cranes on uneven terrain. • Implemented GPU-accelerated motion planning for enhanced efficiency. • Validated and investigated the motion planner with static and dynamic obstacles.
topics: Dynamics and Control of Mechanical Systems
Control and Dynamics of Mobile Robots
title_cn: 具有负载摆动抑制的自适应地形运动规划用于自主移动起重机
abstract_cn: 移动起重机是用于提升和运输材料的关键建筑设备。然而，由于行走操作过程中的不平坦地形和复杂的载荷动态，其机器人化面临重大挑战。本文提出了一种适应地形的自主移动起重机（AMC）运动规划器，能够在施工现场的地形中导航，同时抑制载荷摆动。该规划器集成了车辆姿态估计器和分析性载荷摆动预测模型，并在基于GPU的并行计算架构上实现。通过在NVIDIA Isaac Sim中进行高保真度模拟进行验证。姿态估计模块在不同分辨率的高程网格图上展示了准确的预测，而摆动预测模型则实现了最长可达3秒的准确预报。运动规划器成功应对了变化的地形和动态障碍，同时将摆动角度保持在安全阈值以下，并实现了实时性能。结果表明，将地形适应与摆动抑制相结合，以便在非结构化施工现场进行AMC操作是可行的。• 开发了适应地形的自主移动起重机运动规划器。• 将载荷摆动抑制集成到运动规划框架中。• 提出了在不平坦地形上移动起重机的预测性载荷摆动模型。• 实现了加速的GPU运动规划以提高效率。• 通过静态和动态障碍物验证并研究了运动规划器。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Feasibility of a Wearable 360° Camera for Personalized Proximity Warning on Construction Sites
abstract: Construction sites pose a high risk of struck-by accidents due to limited situational awareness. This study investigates the feasibility of using a neckband-style wearable 360° camera for proximity warning in construction environments. The proposed framework consists of a data preprocessing module—handling motion blur detection and distortion correction—and a hazard detection module, which integrates object detection with depth estimation. By identifying hazardous equipment and estimating its distance, the system provides personalized warnings to workers at risk. Field tests conducted at actual construction sites demonstrated an F1-score of 0.81 in hazard detection. Unlike fixed cameras or sensor-based systems, this approach enables omnidirectional, individualized hazard monitoring without additional site infrastructure. The wearable camera also minimizes interference with tasks, supporting stable image capture. The findings highlight the potential of combining wearable computer vision and deep learning to improve safety in complex and dynamic construction settings.
title_cn: 可穿戴360°摄像头在建筑工地个性化近距离警告的可行性研究
abstract_cn: 施工现场由于有限的情境意识，存在较高的被撞击事故风险。本研究探讨了在施工环境中使用颈带式可穿戴360°摄像头进行临近警报的可行性。所提出的框架由一个数据预处理模块和一个危险检测模块组成，前者负责处理运动模糊检测和畸变校正，后者则将物体检测与深度估计相结合。通过识别危险设备并估计其距离，该系统为面临风险的工人提供个性化的警报。在实际施工现场进行的现场测试中，危险检测的F1分数达到了0.81。与固定摄像头或基于传感器的系统不同，这种方法能够在不增加现场基础设施的情况下实现全方位的个性化危险监控。可穿戴摄像头还最小化了对任务的干扰，支持稳定的图像捕捉。研究结果突显了将可穿戴计算机视觉与深度学习结合的潜力，以提高复杂和动态施工环境中的安全性。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Two-Stage Optimization Design Framework for Tower Crane Layout Planning in Modular Integrated Construction Considering Transportation Efficiency, Operator Visibility, and Lifting Safety
abstract: With the increasing prevalence of modular integrated construction (MiC) projects, effective tower crane layout planning has become crucial to balance multiple goals, including efficiency and safety. Studies typically focus on single-objective optimization, primarily minimizing total traveling time or cost in conventional construction sites. The larger and heavier components used in MiC necessitate cranes with higher lifting capacity, which complicates planning and raises concerns about lifting safety. This study presents a two-stage optimization design framework for the single-tower crane layout in MiC. First, a multiobjective optimization model was proposed, incorporating considerations of traveling time, visibility, and lifting moment. The mathematical formulation for traveling time was modified to account for module rotation time and the distinct movement features of tower cranes. Second, heuristic algorithms, including the nondominated sorting genetic algorithm III and multiobjective particle swarm optimization, were employed to solve the proposed multiobjective optimization problem. The final optimal layout was determined using the technique for order of preference by similarity to ideal solution method based on varying weights for the model’s objectives. The proposed approach was validated through a case study of a MiC project in Hong Kong. Experimental results demonstrate a 26% increase in hoisting efficiency, a 9.3% improvement in operator visibility, and a 23.8% reduction in total lifting moment compared to the original layout. Additionally, optimizing the initial orientation of the modules leads to a 12.6% improvement in traveling time. To further support decision-making, a user interface system was developed, enabling planners to make informed choices during the planning process. This study provides a structured and practical approach for optimizing tower crane layouts in modular construction projects, integrating efficiency and safety considerations. By offering practitioners tools to achieve customized layout solutions during the preconstruction stage, this framework significantly enhances the planning process for MiC projects.
title_cn: 考虑运输效率、操作员可视性和起重安全的模块化集成建筑中塔式起重机布局规划的两阶段优化设计框架
abstract_cn: 随着模块化集成建筑（MiC）项目的日益普及，有效的塔吊布局规划已变得至关重要，以平衡多个目标，包括效率和安全性。现有研究通常集中于单目标优化，主要是最小化传统施工现场的总行程时间或成本。MiC中使用的更大、更重的构件需要更高起重能力的起重机，这使得规划变得复杂，同时提升安全性的担忧也随之增加。本研究提出了一种针对MiC中单塔吊布局的两阶段优化设计框架。首先，提出了一个多目标优化模型，考虑了行程时间、可视性和起重力矩等因素。对行程时间的数学公式进行了调整，以考虑模块旋转时间和塔吊独特的运动特征。其次，采用了启发式算法，包括非支配排序遗传算法III和多目标粒子群优化，来解决提出的多目标优化问题。最终的最优布局是基于模型目标的不同权重使用理想解相似性排序法（TOPSIS）确定的。通过对香港一个MiC项目的案例研究，对提出的方法进行了验证。实验结果表明，与原始布局相比，吊装效率提高了26%，操作可视性改善了9.3%，总起重力矩减少了23.8%。此外，优化模块的初始朝向可以使行程时间改善12.6%。为了进一步支持决策，开发了一个用户界面系统，使规划者在规划过程中能够做出明智的选择。本研究为模块化建筑项目中塔吊布局的优化提供了一种结构化和实用的方法，融合了效率和安全性考虑。通过为从业者提供在施工前阶段实现定制布局解决方案的工具，该框架显著增强了MiC项目的规划过程。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Advancing Mental Health Management in Construction Using Neurophysiological Approaches: A Systematic Review
abstract: Mental health issues are increasingly recognized as critical concerns in the construction industry. While traditional assessment methods rely on subjective self-reports, emerging neuropsychological tools offer objective and real-time measures of workers’ psychological states. However, there is limited understanding of how these tools have been applied to manage mental health for construction workers in the existing literature. Therefore, this study aims to examine the application of neurophysiological tools in managing the mental health of construction workers through a systematic review. A systematic search was conducted and 41 eligible studies were reviewed. The results were categorized based on a conceptual framework including four domains: appraisal of stressors, assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, coping interventions, and outcomes of mental health conditions. The findings revealed that (1) most studies focused on the assessment of psychophysiological outcomes, particularly stress, emotional states, and mental fatigue, demonstrating the feasibility of applying neurophysiological methods to capturing real-time psychological responses; (2) few studies addressed the appraisal of stressors or coping interventions, revealing a critical gap in understanding how construction workers perceive and manage stress in real time; and (3) electroencephalography (EEG) emerged as the most widely used method in measuring diverse mental health conditions, while the increasing adoption of multimodal integration highlights a growing trend toward more comprehensive, reliable, and accurate assessments of workers’ mental states. A key contribution of this study is the development of one of the first integrative frameworks linking neuropsychological tools with holistic mental health management in construction. It advances the current state of knowledge by clarifying the distinct role of physiological metrics (i.e., detection, monitoring, validation, and association) across four domains and offering an in-depth understanding of the practical applicability of neuropsychological methods in assessing mental health conditions. The framework also provides a practical guide for applying neurophysiological tools in mental health management of construction workers for both researchers and practitioners.
title_cn: 在建筑行业中利用神经生理学方法推进心理健康管理：系统评价
abstract_cn: 心理健康问题在建筑行业中日益受到重视。传统评估方法依赖于主观自我报告，而新兴的神经心理工具则提供了对工人心理状态的客观实时测量。然而，现有文献对这些工具在建筑工人心理健康管理中的应用了解有限。因此，本研究旨在通过系统性综述探讨神经生理工具在建筑工人心理健康管理中的应用。我们进行了系统搜索，并审查了41项符合条件的研究。结果根据一个包括四个领域的概念框架进行分类：压力源评估、心理生理结果评估、应对干预和心理健康状况结果。研究发现：(1) 大多数研究集中于心理生理结果的评估，特别是压力、情绪状态和心理疲劳，表明应用神经生理方法捕捉实时心理反应的可行性；(2) 很少有研究涉及压力源评估或应对干预，揭示了对建筑工人如何实时感知和管理压力的理解存在重要空白；(3) 脑电图（EEG）成为测量各种心理健康状况最广泛使用的方法，而多模式整合的日益采用则凸显了向更全面、可靠和准确评估工人心理状态的趋势。本研究的一项重要贡献是开发了首个将神经心理工具与建筑行业整体心理健康管理相结合的综合框架。它通过阐明生理指标（即检测、监测、验证和关联）在四个领域的不同作用，推动了当前知识的进步，同时深入理解了神经心理方法在评估心理健康状况方面的实际适用性。该框架也为研究人员和从业者提供了在建筑工人心理健康管理中应用神经生理工具的实用指南。

journal_name: Journal of Construction Engineering and Management
title: Effects of BIM Application Maturity on Cooperative Behavior in Construction Projects: The Mediating Role of Relational Governance
title_cn: 建筑项目中BIM应用成熟度对合作行为的影响：关系治理的中介作用

title: Maritime operations in ice-covered waters: A 25-year data-driven study of baltic sea ice conditions and icebreaker-ship operations
abstract: • Delivers the first long-term, data-driven insights into Baltic Sea ice navigation. • Presents a full-spectrum characterization of Baltic Sea ice conditions. • Analyzes quantitative insights into icebreaker-ship operation features. • Provides regional mapping revealing distinct operational metrics and patterns. • Establishes a comprehensive foundation for improving maritime resilience in ice-covered waters. Climate change and evolving shipping patterns have increased attention on navigation in ice-covered waters, where harsh environmental conditions may lead to operational disruptions and emergency situations. The Baltic Sea represents a distinctive case in which intensive maritime traffic coincides with pronounced seasonal sea ice variability. During winter, navigation depends on a coordinated system of icebreaker assistance and regulatory measures to maintain continuity of transport under ice-induced constraints. This study presents a 25-year data-driven analysis of ice conditions and icebreaker-ship operations in the Baltic Sea, providing a systematic empirical characterization of long-term winter navigation practices. Drawing on comprehensive datasets of ice extent, thickness, and duration, the paper generates a new spectrum combing ice thickness and ice day. With detailed operational records of icebreaker-assisted activities, the study quantifies spatial and temporal patterns in assistance demand, fleet deployment, and navigational performance across subregions. The results offer an integrated perspective on maritime operations in ice, contributing to a consolidated empirical foundation for understanding winter navigation and evidence-based discussion on resilience and emergency preparedness in ice-affected maritime transport environments.
title_cn: 冰覆盖水域的海洋作业：基于25年数据的波罗的海冰况与破冰船-船舶作业研究
abstract_cn:
• 提供对波罗的海冰航行的第一手长期数据驱动洞察。  
• 展示波罗的海冰情条件的全方位特征。  
• 分析冰破船与货船操作特征的定量洞察。  
• 提供区域地图，揭示不同的操作指标和模式。  
• 建立全面的基础，以改善冰覆水域的海洋韧性。  

气候变化和航运模式的演变使得在冰覆水域的航行备受关注，恶劣的环境条件可能导致操作中断和紧急情况。波罗的海是一个独特的案例，密集的海上交通与显著的季节性海冰变异相吻合。冬季，航行依赖于冰破船的协调援助系统和监管措施，以维持在冰层约束下的运输连续性。本研究提供对波罗的海冰情和冰破船-船只操作的25年数据驱动分析，系统性地表征长期冬季航行实践。通过综合冰的范围、厚度和持续时间的数据集，论文生成了一个新的组合谱系，包括冰厚度和冰日。借助详细的冰破船协助活动的操作记录，研究量化了各子区域援助需求、舰队部署和航行表现的空间和时间模式。结果为冰区航运操作提供了一个综合视角，为理解冬季航行以及在受冰影响的海上运输环境下的韧性和应急准备的循证讨论奠定了坚实的经验基础。

title: Influence of short fibres in FRCM-matrix on the in–plane shear ductility of masonry walls: A preliminary study
title_cn: 短纤维在FRCM基体中对砌体墙面内剪切延性影响的初步研究

title: Predicting reinforcement corrosion in concrete based on CT data using a two-stage multilayer perceptron model
title_cn: 基于CT数据的混凝土钢筋腐蚀预测采用双阶段多层感知器模型

title: Probabilistic dynamic model for high concrete-faced rockfill dam settlement prediction and anomaly identification
title_cn: 高混凝土面料石坝沉降预测与异常识别的概率动态模型

title: Dynamic curvature pooling graph convolutional network to fuse multi-sensor signals for remaining useful life prediction
title_cn: 动态曲率池化图卷积网络用于融合多传感器信号以预测剩余使用寿命

title: AI-assisted bridge management system using deep reinforcement learning with expert demonstrations
title_cn: 基于专家示范的深度强化学习的人工智能辅助桥梁管理系统

title: Deep learning and heuristic exploration for risk-aware scheduling in construction projects
title_cn: 深度学习和启发式探索在建筑项目风险感知调度中的应用

title: Deliberate or Emergent? How Organizations Adopt Hybrid Project Management
abstract: Hybrid project management combines traditional and agile approaches for managing complex projects. While its benefits and setups are well studied, how organizations adopt and implement hybrid project management remains unclear. Hence, this study addresses this gap through a multiple-case design, finding that hybrid project management adoption is shaped by organizational context, leadership, and iterative adjustments to evolving needs. It proposes a Hybrid Project Management Adoption Model, featuring a novel distinction between conscious adoption (a deliberate, structured transition) and unconscious adoption (an organic, emergent evolution). The study advances hybrid project management research by theorizing adoption as a dual-path process and explaining how practices evolve under organizational conditions.
title_cn: 故意还是自发？组织如何采用混合项目管理
abstract_cn: 混合项目管理结合了传统与敏捷方法以管理复杂项目。尽管其优势和设置已有充分研究，但组织如何采纳和实施混合项目管理仍然不明确。因此，本研究通过多案例设计解决了这一空白，发现混合项目管理的采纳受到组织环境、领导力及对不断变化需求的迭代调整的影响。研究提出了一个混合项目管理采纳模型，强调了自觉采纳（一个有意且结构化的过渡）与非自觉采纳（一个有机且自发的演变）之间的新区别。该研究通过将采纳理论化为双路径过程，并解释在组织条件下实践如何演变，从而推动了混合项目管理研究的发展。

title: From detection to decision: integrating contextual metadata into an AI-based hospital hazard detection system
abstract: • Two-stage model integrates metadata to improve hospital hazard detection. • Reduces false detections by leveraging human expertise on hazard occurrences. • Enhanced cross-location generalization without model retraining. • Enables lower detection thresholds while maintaining high precision. • Various object detectors assessed on realistic indoor hazard scenarios. Maintaining environmental safety in hospitals is critical for preventing injuries and infections, yet manual monitoring is resource-intensive and prone to coverage gaps. This study presents a novel, two-stage AI framework for automated hazard detection. We first evaluated three state-of-the-art architectures—YOLOv8, DETR, and EfficientDet—finding that while all models demonstrated strong in-domain performance, they suffered significant accuracy loss in unseen areas due to domain shift. Among these models, YOLOv8 demonstrated superior baseline robustness. To address this generalization gap, we developed a second, metadata-augmented refinement layer that integrates hospital-specific spatial and temporal hazard information. Uniquely, this approach incorporates expert operational knowledge externally during inference rather than embedding it during training, thereby reducing the need for extensive annotated datasets or frequent model retraining. Experiments conducted in a major tertiary medical center demonstrate that metadata augmentation significantly improves detection reliability in cross-domain scenarios. The system operates effectively at lower objectiveness thresholds, achieving the high recall essential for safety–critical applications while simultaneously improving precision. Overall, the proposed framework offers a scalable and data-efficient solution for real-time environmental risk management. By bridging the gap between visual AI capabilities and the rigorous safety demands of healthcare facilities, it provides a practical pathway for enhancing hazard detection, situational awareness, and operational resilience.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 从检测到决策：将上下文元数据整合到基于AI的医院危险检测系统中
abstract_cn: • 两阶段模型整合元数据以提高医院危险检测。 • 通过利用人类在危险发生方面的专业知识减少误报。 • 增强跨位置的泛化能力，无需重训练模型。 • 实现较低的检测阈值，同时保持高精度。 • 在现实室内危险场景中评估了多种目标检测器。 在医院中维护环境安全对于防止伤害和感染至关重要，但手动监测资源密集且容易出现覆盖缺口。本研究提出了一种新颖的两阶段人工智能框架用于自动化危险检测。我们首先评估了三种最先进的架构——YOLOv8、DETR 和 EfficientDet，发现尽管所有模型在领域内性能强劲，但由于领域转移，它们在未见区域的准确性具有显著损失。在这些模型中，YOLOv8展现出更强的基线鲁棒性。为了解决这一泛化差距，我们开发了第二个元数据增强的精炼层，该层整合了医院特定的空间和时间危险信息。独特的是，这种方法在推理过程中外部整合专家操作知识，而不是在训练过程中嵌入，从而减少了对广泛标注数据集或频繁模型重训练的需求。在一家大型三级医疗中心进行的实验表明，元数据增强显著提高了跨域场景中的检测可靠性。该系统在较低的客观性阈值下有效运行，实现了安全关键应用所需的高召回率，同时提高了精度。总体而言，所提出的框架为实时环境风险管理提供了一种可扩展且数据高效的解决方案。通过弥合视觉人工智能能力与医疗设施严格安全要求之间的差距，它为提升危险检测、情境意识和操作韧性提供了实用途径。

title: The ADAPTER-health questionnaire: A tool for measuring team resilience in healthcare
title_cn: ADAPTER健康问卷：一种测量医疗团队韧性的工具

title: Hybrid deep reinforcement learning for optimizing electric vehicle charging station placement: Multi agent-based simulations using real-world data
title_cn: 混合深度强化学习用于优化电动汽车充电站布局：基于多智能体的使用真实数据的模拟

title: Hybrid bend-loss optical fiber sensing and photogrammetry for deformation and damage monitoring of masonry structures
title_cn: 混合弯曲损耗光纤传感与摄影测量技术在砖石结构变形与损坏监测中的应用

title: Exploring psychophysiological methods for human–robot collaboration in construction
title_cn: 探讨建筑领域人机协作的心理生理方法

title: Urban areas have higher heat exposure, but rural areas face greater exposure inequality
title_cn: 城市地区面临更高的热暴露，而农村地区则面临更大的暴露不平等。

title: DG-SHAP: A dimensionality reduction GNN-based fault diagnosis method for chillers and its SHAP interpretability analysis
title_cn: DG-SHAP：一种基于图神经网络的冷却设备故障诊断方法及其SHAP可解释性分析

title: Unsupervised consumer clustering and layered optimization for resilient micro energy hub management
title_cn: 无监督消费者聚类与分层优化在弹性微能量中心管理中的应用

title: Experimental investigations of the effect of furniture on the vibration performance of lightweight timber floors
abstract: This study presents an experimental investigation of the vibration performance of lightweight timber-joisted floors under different furniture arrangements. Three floors with identical geometry and varying construction were tested to evaluate the effect of furniture, as a live load distribution, on modal parameters and human-induced dynamic responses. The results showed that adding furniture to the bare floors improved vibration performance, leading to a reduction in dynamic responses. However, for furnished floors, different furniture arrangements significantly influenced the floor dynamics, highlighting the importance of considering realistic live load distributions in the vibration assessment of lightweight floors. In order to predict the dynamic responses, the simplified response prediction method in prEN 1995 was found to overestimate RMS accelerations and did not accurately capture the observed behavior. To better understand the relationship between fundamental modal parameters and dynamic responses, normalized parameters incorporating modal mass, mode shape, and damping were introduced, improving correlation with RMS accelerations. Finally, a predictive model for the furniture reduction factor indicated that, in addition to modal parameters, walking direction, path, and furniture arrangement were the most influential predictors, providing a practical tool for timber floor vibration design. • Experimental evaluation of lightweight timber floors showed a strong influence of furniture arrangements on floor dynamic behaviour. • Furniture increases the energy dissipation, and different furniture arrangements can alter the floor modal parameters significantly. • Normalized modal parameters ( ϕ 1 / M ∗ 1 and ϕ 1 /( M ∗ 1 ζ 1 )) improved correlation with measured RMS accelerations compared to using M ∗ 1 alone. • Simplified prediction method in prEN 1995 overestimates acceleration responses and does not match observed responses. • Predictive model for the furniture reduction factor identified walking direction, path, and furniture layout as key predictors.
title_cn: 轻型木地板振动性能受家具影响的实验研究
abstract_cn: 本研究对轻质木梁地板在不同家具布局下的振动性能进行了实验研究。测试了三种几何形状相同但构造不同的地板，以评估家具作为活载荷分布对模态参数和人为引发的动态响应的影响。结果表明，在裸露地板上添加家具改善了振动性能，减小了动态响应。然而，对于已布置家具的地板，不同的家具安排显著影响了地面的动态特性，突显了在轻质地板振动评估中考虑真实活载荷分布的重要性。为了预测动态响应，prEN 1995中简化的响应预测方法被发现高估了均方根加速度，并未准确捕捉到观察到的行为。为了更好地理解基本模态参数与动态响应之间的关系，引入了结合模态质量、模态形状和阻尼的规范化参数，从而提高了与均方根加速度的相关性。最后，家具减少因子的预测模型表明，除了模态参数外，行走方向、路径和家具布局是最具影响力的预测因素，为木地板振动设计提供了一种实用工具。• 对轻质木地板的实验评估显示，家具布局对地板动态行为有很强的影响。 • 家具增加了能量耗散，不同的家具布局可以显著改变地板模态参数。 • 规范化模态参数（ϕ 1 / M ∗ 1 和 ϕ 1 /( M ∗ 1 ζ 1 ）与测得的均方根加速度相比，提供了更好的相关性。 • prEN 1995中的简化预测方法高估了加速度响应，且与观察到的响应不匹配。 • 家具减少因子的预测模型确定行走方向、路径和家具布局为关键预测因素。

title: Through the client's lens: factors impacting project document quality in the South African construction industry
abstract: Purpose This research explores the factors that affect the quality of project documentation in South Africa's construction industry, focusing on the perspectives of public sector clients. It aims to address a gap in existing research by showing how these factors influence document quality. Design/methodology/approach This study uses a qualitative multiple-case study design to explore factors affecting project document quality from the perspective of public sector clients in South Africa. Four government organisations were selected as individual cases to enable cross-case comparison and uncover both common and context-specific insights. This approach allows for a deeper understanding of complex issues within real-world settings and supports both replication and theoretical exploration. It is particularly suited to examining how clients perceive the role of fees and consultant-related factors in shaping documentation quality. Findings The study found that five key factors influence project document quality from the client's perspective: consultant experience, competence, team composition, procurement systems and work ethic. While experience and competence align with previous research, team composition and procurement practices emerged as new client-driven insights. Additionally, low professional fees were found to constrain resources and time, negatively affecting quality. However, fees alone were not seen as the sole determinant. Rather, the interplay between fees, consultant capabilities and resource allocation was identified as critical to producing high-quality documentation. Originality/value This research offers original value by foregrounding the perspectives of public sector clients, an often overlooked stakeholder group in studies on project document quality. By doing so, it uncovers previously underexplored factors such as team composition, procurement practices and work ethic. The study provides a more holistic understanding of how document quality is influenced, particularly in the context of fee structures and consultant capabilities. Its findings support more balanced procurement approaches and contribute to the construction body of knowledge in developing countries.
title_cn: 透过客户的视角：影响南非建筑行业项目文件质量的因素
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究探讨影响南非建筑行业项目文档质量的因素，重点关注公共部门客户的视角。旨在填补现有研究的空白，展示这些因素如何影响文档质量。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用定性多案例研究设计，从南非公共部门客户的角度探讨影响项目文档质量的因素。选择了四个政府组织作为独立案例，以便进行跨案例比较，发现共同的以及特定背景的见解。这种方法能够深入理解现实世界环境中的复杂问题，并同时支持数据复制和理论探索。它特别适合于考察客户如何看待费用和顾问相关因素在塑造文档质量中的作用。 研究发现 研究发现，从客户的角度来看，有五个关键因素影响项目文档质量：顾问经验、能力、团队组成、采购系统和职业道德。虽然经验和能力与以往研究一致，但团队组成和采购实践则作为新的客户驱动见解出现。此外，低专业费用被发现限制了资源和时间，负面影响了质量。然而，费用本身并未被视为唯一决定因素。相反，费用、顾问能力和资源配置之间的相互作用被确定为产生高质量文档的关键。 独创性/价值 这项研究通过突出公共部门客户的视角，提供了独特的价值，这是在项目文档质量研究中常被忽视的利益相关者群体。通过这样做，它揭示了团队组成、采购实践和职业道德等先前未被充分探讨的因素。该研究为文档质量受到影响的更全面理解提供了基础，特别是在费用结构和顾问能力的背景下。它的发现支持更加平衡的采购方法，并为发展中国家的建筑知识体系做出贡献。

title: Mapping a decade of prefabrication policy in Australia: a systematic review of policy mixes from 2015 to 2025
abstract: Purpose The construction sector faces significant environmental and productivity challenges, increasing the need for more sustainable and efficient building methods such as prefabricated construction. However, its adoption in Australia has remained limited due to regulatory constraints and the dominance of traditional building codes. This study provides a systematic policy-focused review that maps the evolution of prefabrication governance across Australian jurisdictions over the past decade. Design/methodology/approach Using a systematic literature review methodology, this study compiled a multi-level dataset of 87 policy measures issued between 2015 and June 2025 from 19 official Commonwealth and state/territory sources. Each measure was coded into five instrument classes: Incentives, Initiatives, Laws/Regulations, Guidance and Standards. This study undertook a longitudinal analysis of policy sequencing and a cross-jurisdictional comparison of instrument mixes. Findings The analysis shows a clear policy trajectory over decade, progressing from foundational standards and code clarifications to regulatory and guidance consolidation and, ultimately, national coordination. Victoria, New South Wales, Queensland and Western Australia demonstrate the broadest and most active instrument portfolios. Originality/value The study contributes the first integrated map of Australia’s prefabrication policy architecture. It introduces a transferable taxonomy of instruments and proposes a phase model of policy sequencing that can support future causal evaluation and practice reform in public housing delivery. The value of this research lies in its potential to inform policymaking and its ability to facilitate the wider adoption of prefabricated construction in Australia. By analysing the regulatory development, this research will have the capability of developing a more sustainable and efficient construction industry within Australia.
title_cn: 澳大利亚预制政策十年走向的地图：2015年至2025年政策组合的系统评审
abstract_cn:
目的 建筑行业面临重大环境和生产力挑战，这增加了对更可持续和高效的建筑方式（如预制建筑）需求的必要性。然而，由于监管限制和传统建筑规范的主导地位，预制建筑在澳大利亚的采纳一直受到限制。本研究提供了一项系统的政策导向回顾，描绘了过去十年中澳大利亚各地区预制建筑治理的演变。 

设计/方法论 本研究采用系统文献回顾的方法，编制了一个多层级数据集，涵盖2015年至2025年6月间自19个官方联邦及州/领地来源发布的87项政策措施。每项措施被编码为五种工具类别：激励、倡议、法律/法规、指导和标准。本研究进行了政策顺序的纵向分析以及跨地区的工具组合比较。 

研究结果 分析显示出清晰的政策轨迹，十年来逐步从基础标准和规范澄清，转向监管和指导的整合，最终实现国家协调。维多利亚州、新南威尔士州、昆士兰州和西澳大利亚州展示了最广泛和最活跃的工具组合。 

原创性/价值 本研究贡献了澳大利亚预制建筑政策架构的首个综合地图。它引入了一个可转移的工具分类法，并提出了一个政策顺序的阶段模型，可以支持未来因果评估及公共住房交付实践改革。本研究的价值在于其能够为政策制定提供参考，并促进预制建筑在澳大利亚的更广泛采纳。通过分析监管的发展，本研究将有能力开发一个更可持续和高效的建筑行业。
